zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard de Camville於大約1144年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville30歲，母親Melisende de Rethel27歲。他於大約1174年與Nicola de la Haye在英國斯塔福爾克里夫頓 霍爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1199年在英國林可爾史爾被列為sheriff。他去世於大約1214年在英國林可爾史爾林肯 卡素 代金斯享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard de Camville于大约1144年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville30岁，母亲Melisende de Rethel27岁。他于大约1174年与Nicola de la Haye在英国斯塔福爾克里夫頓 霍爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1199年在英国林可爾史爾被列为sheriff。他去世于大约1214年在英国林可爾史爾林肯 卡素 代金斯享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard de Camville was born about 1144, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, was 30 and his mother, Melisende de Rethel, was 27. He married Nicola de la Haye about 1174, in Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1199, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Lincolnshire, England. He died about 1214, in Lincoln Castle Dykings, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard de Camville est né environ 1144, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Melisende de Rethel, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Nicola de la Haye environ 1174, à Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1199, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1214, à Lincoln Castle Dykings, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard de Camville um 1144 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville 30 und seine Mutter Melisende de Rethel 27. Er hat um 1174 in Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, England Nicola de la Haye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1199, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in Lincolnshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1214 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Lincoln Castle Dykings, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Camville è nato il circa 1144 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Melisende de Rethel, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Nicola de la Haye circa 1174, nel Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1199, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Lincolnshire, England. Morì circa 1214, nel Lincoln Castle Dykings, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Camvilleが約1144年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camvilleは30歳，母Melisende de Rethelは27歳であった。約1174年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン ハルでNicola de la Hayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1199年，56歳の時，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は約1214年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルン カストル ディキングズで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Camville(이)가 대략 1144년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Melisende de Rethel(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1174년 영국 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 홀에서 Nicola de la Haye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1199년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 링코실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 대략 1214년 영국 링코실르 링코컨 카스틀 디킨그스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1144–about 1214: tany ho any amin'ny 1144–tany ho any amin'ny 1214

mn.Boylestone, Derbyshire, England, United: Boylestone, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Camville nasceu aproximadamente 1144, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Melisende de Rethel, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Nicola de la Haye aproximadamente 1174, em Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1199, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1214, em Lincoln Castle Dykings, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard de Camville родился около 1144 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Melisende de Rethel, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicola de la Haye около 1174 г. в местности клифтон холл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1199 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff в местности линколншир, Англия. Он умер около 1214 г. в местности линколн кастл дикингс, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.Abt 1144–about 1214: e tusa o le 1144–e tusa o le 1214

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard de Camville nació aproximadamente 1144, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Lilbourne Stanton De Camville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Melisende de Rethel, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Nicola de la Haye aproximadamente 1174, en Clifton Hall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1199, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1214, en Lincoln Castle Dykings, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
